CustomField.description: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.formula: IF( fxRecordTypeDevName__c ="PKI_Americas_SPI" ,IF( Quick_Close__c = True , "" ,IF(TEXT(Sales_Type__c)="Product Sales" , IF(TEXT(FAS_Input_Required__c)="" ,"•FAS/SME Support Needed;" ,"") ,"") & IF(TEXT(Sales_Type__c)="Product Sales" , IF(TEXT(Funding__c)="","•Funding;" ,"") ,"") ) & IF(OR(TEXT(Owner.Owned_by_Company__c) = 'AES' , TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) = 'AES') ,IF(Territory2Id ="" ,"•Territory;" ,"") ,"") & IF(TEXT(Sales_Type__c)="Service Sales" , IF(ISBLANK(Length_of_Proposed_Contract__c) ,'•Length of Contract;' ,"" ) ,"") , IF(Source__c='true' ,IF(OR(TEXT(Owner.Owned_by_Company__c) = 'AES' , TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) = 'AES') ,IF(Territory2Id ="" ,"•Territory;" ,"") ,"") ,"") )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.label: fxMissingFields_stage2
